caption: A woman with shoulder-length black hair and glasses stands against a plain black background. She is wearing a light green, long-sleeved tunic featuring floral embroidery around the neckline and a dark bead necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to her shirt. Across the frames, she is speaking, with her mouth opening and closing and her facial expressions shifting as she talks. In the bottom left corner of the scene, a gold logo is visible next to the text "NPTEL". The camera remains in a static medium shot, capturing her from the waist up, while the only movement occurs in her facial expressions and gestures as she delivers her speech.
